ground_truth.description: Player respawns. The screen is filled with a bright green/yellow pixelated flash, indicating a teleport. The player's health jumps from 39% to 100%, ammo for the current weapon (shotgun) is 50, and the environment changes from an outdoor area with an orange sky to a new indoor, metallic corridor.
